message:
feat(polyfills): Round 8 - crypto KDF, tty, assert in native Zig

- crypto.hkdfSync: HKDF key derivation (sha256, sha384, sha512, sha1)
- crypto.scryptSync: scrypt memory-hard KDF with N/r/p options
- tty module: isatty (native POSIX), ReadStream, WriteStream classes
- assert module: Full Node.js API (ok, strictEqual, notStrictEqual,
  deepStrictEqual, throws, doesNotThrow, fail, ifError, match,
  doesNotMatch, AssertionError, strict)

All implementations in native Zig, removed JS stubs.
